meanings.definition: a device or control that is very useful for a particular job
the faculty of contriving; inventive skill
examples: his skillful contrivance of answers to every problem

meanings.definition: an elaborate or deceitful scheme contrived to deceive or evade
examples: his testimony was just a contrivance to throw us off the track

meanings.definition: an artificial or unnatural or obviously contrived arrangement of details or parts etc.
examples: the plot contained too many improbable contrivances to be believable

meanings.definition: any improvised arrangement for temporary use
